chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

parts.text: 5891 - وَ رَوَى أَبُو حَمْزَةَ اَلثُّمَالِيُّ قَالَ

text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لَمَّا حَضَرَتْ أَبِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلْوَفَاةُ ضَمَّنِي إِلَى صَدْرِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ "يَا بُنَيَّ اِصْبِرْ عَلَى اَلْحَقِّ وَ إِنْ كَانَ مُرّاً يُوَفَّ إِلَيْكَ أَجْرُكَ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5891 - Abu Hamza Al-Thumali narrated that Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said: "When death approached my father (as), he embraced me to his chest and said:
'O' my son, be patient upon the truth even if it is bitter, for your reward will be given to you without measure.'"
